title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift engineering focus from line-by-line code writing to system-level design. She contends that core engineering principles like systems thinking, decomposition, and state management remain valuable and create flow state at a higher abstraction level.
writeup: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents move engineering work away from writing code line by line toward system-level design. The talk holds that core principles such as systems thinking, decomposition, and state management stay valuable as agents handle more of the implementation. The central takeaway: these skills produce flow state at a higher level of abstraction, with separation of concerns and multi-agent systems framing how engineers structure work.
